appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator guidance for Cargo-based validation and documented serialized execution under current machine load.

frictions: The assigned -q Cargo commands produced suite-level summaries rather than per-test-name lines, so evidence is recorded at the command-suite level.
The quiet cargo invocations do not print individual passing test names, so companion `-- --list` runs were needed to map the contract assertions to concrete test cases in command output.
